results.title: Baranga Third-Degree Torture Allegation: Rakesh Behera Undergoing Treatment in Cuttack
results.description: #ବ ାରଙ୍ଗ_ଥାର୍ଡ_ଡିଗ୍ରୀ #କ େମିତି_ଅଛନ୍ତି_ରାକେଶ ବାରଙ୍ଗ ଥାର୍ଡ ଡିଗ୍ରୀ ଘଟଣା । ରାକେଶ ବେହେରାଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରବଳ ମାଡ ମାରିଥିବା ଅଭିଯୋଗ । କଟକ ବଡ଼ ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାରେ ଚିକିତ୍ସିତ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ରାକେଶ । ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ତାଙ୍କର ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟାବସ୍ଥା ଖୁବ୍ ଗୁରୁତର ଥିବା କହିଲେ ବାପା । Serious allegations have emerged in the Baranga third-degree torture case, with claims that Rakesh Behera was subjected to severe physical assault. #BarangaCase #RakeshBehera #ThirdDegreeTorture #Cuttack #OdishaNews #HumanRights #JusticeDemand #BreakingNews #SCBHospital #OdishaTV #otv For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. results.title: Daily Horoscope Today, May 30, 2026: Venus Squares Saturn and the Stars Are Done Being Kind to These Zodiac Signs
results.description: Daily Horoscope Today, May 30, 2026: Saturday does not arrive gently. Venus in Gemini locks into a tense square with Saturn in Aries at dawn, and the Moon burns through the final degrees of Scorpio before shifting into freewheeling Sagittarius by midday, dragging every zodiac sign into a collision between what they desire and what they have actually earned. The Sun and Mercury both blaze through Gemini, keeping conversations fast, ideas electric, and nervous systems slightly overloaded. Mars continues its slow, deliberate march through Taurus, insisting that nothing worth having arrives without patience. Pluto retrograde in Aquarius presses silently on
